╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║  TRAMARCA MANUAL v4 · PROMPTS NANO-BANANA (Gemini 2.5 Flash)      ║
║  8 slots de imagen editorial — tono contemporáneo, no nostálgico  ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

REGLAS COMUNES (pegar al final de cada prompt si hace falta):
— aspect ratio 3:2 landscape, high detail, editorial photography,
  contemporary minimal, flat diffused light, desaturated neutrals,
  absolutely no text no typography no letters visible in the image,
  no golden hour, no warm nostalgia, no letterpress, no vintage patina.
— paleta objetivo: warm off-white paper (#F4F0EB), matte black (#0C0C0C),
  muted concrete grey (#5E5A57), single accent of terracotta-sealing-wax red (#C4553A).

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
SLOT 01 · p06 · FUNDAMENTOS (divider capítulo I)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Macro photograph of a single drop of terracotta sealing wax (#C4553A)
on a sheet of uncoated warm off-white cotton paper. The wax has just
set — clean circular edge, slightly domed, matte finish. Paper texture
visible: subtle tooth, no grain, no patina. Lighting is flat, cold
daylight from a north-facing window. Background is empty paper filling
the frame. The wax dot sits left-of-center. Minimal, editorial, Kinfolk
2024 by way of Pentagram. Shallow depth of field only on paper fibers.
3:2 landscape.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
SLOT 02 · p15 · LOGO (divider capítulo IV)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Extreme macro of a single lowercase period "." debossed into matte
black cardstock (300gsm, uncoated). The deboss is deep, clean, casting
a crisp shadow inside the well. Surrounding surface is pure matte
black with subtle fiber texture. Lighting is raking from the left at
15 degrees, revealing the deboss depth. Cold, architectural,
contemporary editorial still-life — think Stripe Press monograph cover.
No other marks visible. 3:2 landscape, centered composition with
generous negative space.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
SLOT 03 · p28 · COLOR (divider capítulo VI)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Overhead flat-lay on polished concrete surface: eight rectangular
paper swatches arranged in two tight rows of four, slightly
overlapping at the edges. Swatches are matte uncoated paper in these
exact tones in order: deep black, charcoal grey, terracotta red,
warm taupe, cool grey, light stone grey, warm sand, warm off-white
cream. Each swatch is roughly 80×50mm. Cast shadow is very soft from
diffuse overhead daylight. Concrete background shows subtle aggregate
texture. No labels, no text, no hand visible. Editorial, reductive,
contemporary. 3:2 landscape.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
SLOT 04 · p31 · ICONOGRAFÍA (divider capítulo V)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Close-up photograph of a brushed stainless steel plate (20×15cm)
lying flat, with eight simple line-art icons etched into its surface
in a 4×2 grid. Icons are abstract: circle, square, arrow, dot,
horizontal line, vertical line, plus sign, triangle outline. Each
icon occupies roughly the same 2cm square. Etching is shallow and
precise, visible as a subtle shadow in the steel. Lighting is flat
overhead fluorescent daylight, producing a muted reflection without
hotspots. Steel surface shows fine brushed grain. Cold, industrial,
swiss-modern, no patina, no hands. 3:2 landscape.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
SLOT 05 · p33-34 · FOTOGRAFÍA (2 editoriales complementarias)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

→ IMAGEN 5A (bookends existing moodboard):
Overhead flat-lay on a concrete-grey desk surface. Objects arranged
in a loose editorial composition: a single matte-black hardcover A4
book lying closed and horizontal, a terracotta red ceramic coaster
(plain, no markings), a short stack of two uncoated off-white paper
sheets, and a single black mechanical pencil. No hands, no clutter,
no labels. Light is flat, cold, from directly above. The composition
reads "studio of a brand editor in Madrid, 2026". Contemporary
minimal. 3:2 landscape.

→ IMAGEN 5B:
Medium-close photograph of a single matte-black A4 landscape book
standing closed on its edge against a warm off-white paper backdrop.
The book's cover is completely blank (no text, no logo, no mark of
any kind). A single small terracotta dot is visible on the spine —
about 8mm diameter, dead center. Lighting is flat, diffused,
cold-neutral. Background is an empty paper wall. Shallow depth of
field on the book's edge. Editorial, reductive, Pentagram-adjacent.
3:2 landscape.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
SLOT 06 · p35 · VOZ Y TONO (divider capítulo VII)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Close-up of a single sheet of uncoated warm off-white paper lying
flat, crossed by a single crisp horizontal line of typewritten
characters in black ink — but every letter is an abstract typographic
mark (asterisks, dashes, slashes, dots) so NO words are legible. The
line is tight, monospaced, dense. Around it, empty paper fills the
frame. Lighting is flat, cold daylight. The effect reads "the act of
writing, rigorously". No text should be readable. Editorial still-life,
contemporary. 3:2 landscape.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
SLOT 07 · p40 · APLICACIONES (divider capítulo X)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Overhead flat-lay on a warm off-white paper surface: one A4 landscape
kraft-paper folder (brown, 300gsm, matte, clean edges) lying
horizontally, slightly angled 5 degrees off-axis. On top of the
folder, a matte-black hardcover book (A4 landscape) sits partially
overlapping its right edge. To the right of the composition, one
small sheet of paper with a single deep-red wax seal (circular, ~3cm).
No text, no labels, no logo, no hand. Light is flat cold daylight
from above. Composition reads "what a Tramarca Premium delivery looks
like". Contemporary editorial, no nostalgia, no golden tone. 3:2
landscape.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
SLOT 08 · p47 · MARCA EN MOVIMIENTO (divider capítulo XIII)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Architectural still-life: a single 1-meter-wide matte black rectangle
mounted flush on a cold grey concrete wall in Madrid. The concrete is
polished but raw — subtle staining, no cracks. A single terracotta
red thin vertical line (1cm wide, 40cm tall) is painted onto the
black rectangle, aligned to the right third. Lighting is flat cold
afternoon light, north-facing. No people, no text, no brand marks
visible. Ambient Madrid urban context barely implied. Feels like a
still from a corporate brand video — clinical, calm, present-tense.
Stripe Press meets Herzog & de Meuron. 3:2 landscape.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
WORKFLOW RECOMENDADO
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

1. Abrir nano-banana (Gemini 2.5 Flash image) en gemini.google.com
2. Pegar cada prompt tal cual, sin modificar.
3. Generar 2-3 variantes por slot.
4. Descargar la mejor como:
   /Users/fer/Projects/claude/brand-manuals/04-tramarca/assets/img/
   con los nombres:
   p06-fundamentos.jpg
   p15-logo.jpg
   p28-color.jpg
   p31-iconografia.jpg
   p33-foto-5a.jpg
   p34-foto-5b.jpg
   p35-voz.jpg
   p40-aplicaciones.jpg
   p47-motion.jpg

5. Avísame cuando estén y hago el wiring en build_v4.py para cada
   divider (sutil, opacity 0.25, sin tapar roman numeral).

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
FIN · 8 prompts · 9 imágenes (slot 5 = 2 variantes)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
